tickets.subject: Cannot log in with SSO
tickets.body: Since the latest update our entire team is locked out via SSO. SAML assertions are failing. This is blocking all work.

tickets.subject: Incorrect invoice charge
tickets.body: We were billed twice for the Enterprise tier in October. Please issue a credit immediately.

tickets.subject: Dashboard loads very slowly
tickets.body: The main analytics dashboard takes 30+ seconds to load for large date ranges. This started two weeks ago.

tickets.subject: Data sync not updating
tickets.body: Records updated in our ERP are not reflecting in the platform after 24 hours. The sync log shows no errors.

tickets.subject: Something seems off with reports
tickets.body: Not sure if this is a bug or configuration but the numbers in the monthly report look different from last month.

tickets.subject: If this is not fixed we will cancel
tickets.body: We have raised this sync issue three times now with no resolution. Our leadership is evaluating alternatives. This is our final notice before we begin cancellation proceedings.
